reviews.comment:
Muy buena ubicación. Agradable la atención de su empleado no doy nombre porque no le pregunte. Si nos dio buena orientación para salir a la ruta que queríamos. Ya que eramoa turistas conociendo esa linda ciudad.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location. The employee was very helpful; I didn't ask for his name. He gave us good directions to the route we wanted, as we were tourists exploring this lovely city.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4aEllSGVREAE

reviews.comment:
Se vendió a un particular el auxilio del automovil club.estan en un galpón de la Lavalle ESO YA ES NEGOCIO LOCAL NO ES YA EL ACA

(Translated by Google)
The auto club's roadside assistance service was sold to a private individual. They're in a warehouse on Lavalle Street. That's a local business, not the ACA anymore.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4ejlDcVFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Últimamente no se qué pasa con esta estación, cada vez que voy las empleadas me cargan nafta tienen un aire despectivo y de mala atención. Para cargar puntos exigen dni físico, yo no sé quién asesora este comercio, pero hoy se sabe que no te pueden exigir un dni físico para llevártelo, cuando con numero de trámite se realizan grandes estafas. Solo se muestra para corroborar identidad.

(Translated by Google)
Lately, I don't know what's going on with this gas station. Every time I go, the employees who pump my gas have a dismissive and unhelpful attitude. To add points to my account, they demand a physical ID. I don't know who advises this business, but these days it's common knowledge that they can't demand a physical ID to take it, especially since large scams are carried out using the transaction number. It's only shown to verify identity.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4dy1Uc1RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio, muy buen atención tanto del personal de playa, cómo la gente del bar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station, very good service from both the beach staff and the people at the bar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4M2VqeGtnRRAB

I charge every day, the best place

reviews.comment:
Tiene todos los servicios necesarios para un viaje largo.  Muy buena atención.  De fácil acceso.  Entre, además a comprar unas galletas y los precios exhibidos estaban de adorno porque me cobraron bastante más caro todo.  Los baños estaban sucios.

(Translated by Google)
It has all the necessary amenities for a long trip. Very good service. Easy access. I went in to buy some cookies, and the displayed prices were just for show because they charged me much more for everything. The bathrooms were dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSNDQzdkdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicios dual, personal correcto, pulcros y de buena predisposición, las instalaciones siempre limpias, de las pocas que tienen precios oficiales, y muy importante: tienen para cargar aire gratis, siempre la elijo y recomiendo!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent dual fuel station, polite, clean, and helpful staff, always spotless facilities, one of the few that displays official prices, and very importantly: they offer free air refills! I always choose it and highly recommend it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSZ3FESFF3EAE
